expectations.evidence: No mention of newspaper metaphor or ordering exports/public API at top of file. The userService.ts analysis focuses on DI, mixed responsibilities, but not file ordering.
Proposes `*.test.ts beside source` and states 'Tests next to source: No mental mapping between tests/userService.test.ts and services/userService.ts.'
Proposes `features/user/`, `features/order/`, `features/product/` structure. States: 'This groups files by technical role... To work on the user feature, you touch 5+ directories.'
